prompt: A wide cinematic shot of a long table. On the right, a wealthy man in a sharp suit sits comfortably bathed in warm golden light, surrounded by dozens of pristine, glowing vials of clean water arranged neatly on unblemished golden tiles. On the left, the table transitions into shattered, barren wood where a massive, desaturated crowd of impoverished, exhausted people in cold blue-grey shadows reach desperately for a single shattered plate holding one drop of water. Forced perspective, highly detailed, dramatic lighting contrast, no text, no labels, no charts, single frame.
dataset_name: Billionaire wealth vs global poor dataset
insight: While hundreds of millions of people globally survive on less than $2.15 a day, a microscopic fraction of the population hoards an overwhelming surplus of the world's wealth.
